meta.tagline: Single-pin massage & float studio · American Fork, UT · 4.9★ × 402 reviews
meta.address: 366 S 500 E Suite B, American Fork UT 84003
meta.campaign_posture: Hold budget · Redirect targeting · Same production scale · Authority rebuilt post-halt
meta.doc_subtitle: Q2 2026 strategic diagnosis (v3, refreshed 2026-05-22). The pin is gaining rank where it holds cells. Marginal lift sits on 7 structural fixes + redirected production at full scale. Authority workstream rebuilt around the 2026-05-13 off-page program halt.
meta.v3_changes: Off-page workstream rebuilt around the 2026-05-13 HQDM-internal program halt — SEO Neo stack (DAS / Blast / RD100 / NAP-overlay / AI Articles / Driving Directions / Cloud Page / Link Revolver / BatchGeo / ATB / GMB Pin Creation) removed from BB rotation; replaced with manual citations + 1 monthly PR pitch + 1 monthly partner-outreach touch + on-site link equity. Cleanup approach reaffirmed: small-level 301-to-MAIN canonicals only, 0 NOINDEX, 0 410. Dashboard density tuned per 2026-05-21 Matt+Milica feedback.

kpis.label: Rank tightening — massage therapist near me
kpis.detail: Avg rank on 95 cells visible both dates. BB #2 of 10 main pins. Top-3 cells 27 → 37. Mean dx +1.46/cell.

kpis.label: Float surface owned
kpis.detail: BB #1 on both float queries across 106/106 saturated cells at avg rank 1.34 / 1.68. The moat.

kpis.label: Sitewide NAP mismatch
kpis.detail: Every page uses chat phone 855-5834; GBP primary is 734-9798. One-line WordPress fix. HP-01 in M1 W1.

kpis.label: Trigger-point page scope
kpis.detail: /trigger-point-therapy/ (2,773 words live 2026-05-18) references medical injections + dry needling. Owner-flagged.

kpis.label: GSC cannibalization
kpis.detail: 2+ BB URLs ranking simultaneously. 'best massage near me' = 20 URLs, 196K imps, 2 clicks. Fix: 84 small-301 to MAIN.

kpis.label: Untracked rank surface
kpis.detail: DataForSEO Maps SERP at AF pin shows BB top-3 for 27 unranked service queries — lymphatic drainage (3,600 UT vol) is the biggest.

competitor_churn.name: Paul and Tasha Massage (sibling pin)
competitor_churn.note: Owner's other pin — out of scope

root_causes.title: Trigger-point page scope mismatch + duplicate canonical
root_causes.body: /trigger-point-therapy/ references medical injections + dry needling (owner-flagged). SP-01 rewrites body content (same H1, same URL); CN-01 small-level 301s the duplicate to /modalities-techniques/trigger-point-therapy/ canonical (745 inbound links).

root_causes.title: Sitewide NAP + schema thinness + cupping 404
root_causes.body: 372/372 pages use chat phone (855); only 1 has GBP primary (734). Every page carries generic DaySpa schema only — no Service / FAQPage / LocalBusiness anywhere. /cupping-massage/ returns 404 while 10+ cupping blog posts link to it. HP-01 + TPL-01 (M1) + SP-02/03 schema rollout (M2-M3) close the structural gap.

root_causes.title: Off-page playbook rebuild (post-2026-05-13 program halt) — NEW IN v3
root_causes.body: BB's DA 20 → 28 lift over engagement was partly driven by the SEO Neo stack (DAS / Blast / RD100 / NAP-overlay / AI Articles / Driving Directions / Cloud Page / Link Revolver / BatchGeo / ATB / GMB Pin Creation) — halted across HQDM's book of business 2026-05-13. Forward authority work: manual Tier-1/2/3 citation submissions (AMTA, ABMP, Utah MTA, chambers), 1 monthly digital-PR pitch (postpartum / athlete-recovery angles), 1 monthly partner-outreach touch, on-site link equity earned by refreshed canonicals + new builds. REP-01 M1 W2 runs a DataForSEO Backlinks scan to decide if a disavow file is warranted. Spend posture unchanged; mix changes.

root_causes.title: Doorway + geo cohort needs fill + small-redirect (never bulk NOINDEX)
root_causes.body: 326 GSC queries have 2+ BB URLs ranking. 130 URLs decisioned: 3 LEAVE · 9 REFRESH · 19 REPURPOSE · 84 small-301-to-MAIN · 14 REVIEW. Production at scale CONTINUES — 6 new location pages/month redirected to real catchment × service matrix gaps.

root_causes.title: Pleasant Grove cells open + 27 untracked service ranks at AF pin
root_causes.body: 3 PG winners collapsed (Paradise -143, MassageLuXe -138, owner's sibling -188); 5 new entrants filled. DataForSEO Maps SERP at AF pin shows BB #1 for 15 untracked queries (couples massage AF, deep tissue AF, cupping near me, myofascial release...) and #2-#3 for 12 more — lymphatic drainage massage (3,600 UT vol) is the single biggest unlocked surface, gated on Owner #7.

root_causes.title: Float moat held + near-me tightening + 4.9★ × 402
root_causes.body: Float queries held at 106/106 saturation. On near-me queries BB is #2 and #3 of substantial competitive sets. Top-3 cells on 'massage therapist near me' 27 → 37. Marginal lift is now post cadence + matrix-fill builds + Q-format LLM articles + service-page schema — and authority shifts to manual + earned channels per the post-halt playbook.
